categories.name: American Animation & Graphic Novel
categories.name_zh: 美式动画 / 图像小说

presets.name: Cinematic Realism
presets.subtitle_zh: 自然光 · 胶片颗粒 · 真实表演
presets.description: 最通用的真人电影感，用于剧情短片、广告感分镜、严肃叙事
presets.positive_prompt: cinematic photorealism, live-action film still, natural human proportions, realistic skin texture, motivated lighting, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, volumetric atmosphere, professional color grading, realistic production design, grounded emotional performance, high-end movie frame
presets.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, 3d render, plastic skin, over-smoothed face, over-sharpened, low quality, blurry, watermark, logo, text, captions, deformed hands, extra fingers
presets.sample_prompt: A young creator stands on a rain-wet train platform at dusk, holding a brass compass glowing faint blue, distant city lights behind the mist, medium-wide shot, three-quarter view, quiet emotional tension

presets.name: Classic Film Noir
presets.subtitle_zh: 黑白 · 高反差 · 悬疑压迫
presets.description: 黑白、高反差、悬疑、压迫感。适配侦探、犯罪、心理戏
presets.positive_prompt: classic black-and-white noir, low-key lighting, strong chiaroscuro, deep shadows, wet pavement reflections, venetian blind shadow patterns, smoky atmosphere, vintage film grain, dramatic silhouette, moody urban night, tense cinematic composition
presets.negative_prompt: bright daylight, colorful palette, flat lighting, cheerful mood, glossy 3d, cartoon, anime, low contrast, watermark, logo, text, captions, blurry
presets.sample_prompt: A lone investigator waits under a station roof at night, rain dripping from the metal beams, holding a small compass that catches a pale highlight, steam crossing the tracks, strong silhouette

presets.name: Japanese Film Look
presets.subtitle_zh: 克制 · 自然主义 · 淡淡情绪
presets.description: 日剧/日本电影的自然主义胶片感，低饱和、自然光、留白和生活质感
presets.positive_prompt: Japanese live-action film look, quiet naturalism, soft overcast daylight, muted color palette, gentle contrast, realistic everyday locations, subtle film grain, restrained composition, emotional stillness, lived-in details, seasonal atmosphere, understated cinematic framing
presets.negative_prompt: overly dramatic lighting, Hollywood blockbuster look, neon cyberpunk, high saturation, glossy commercial render, anime, cartoon, 3d, excessive bokeh, text, logo, watermark
presets.sample_prompt: A young traveler stands at a small rural train station after rain, holding a brass compass, grey-blue sky, vending machine glow in the background, quiet emotional pause

presets.name: Hong Kong Cinema
presets.subtitle_zh: 霓虹 · 街头 · 手持能量
presets.description: 港片的都市密度、霓虹、街头、手持感、强情绪
presets.positive_prompt: Hong Kong cinema mood, dense urban street, wet asphalt, neon signs, sodium vapor streetlights, handheld camera energy, dramatic backlight, smoky alley atmosphere, expressive close framing, gritty romantic tension, 1990s urban film color, cinematic motion blur
presets.negative_prompt: clean futuristic city, empty street, sterile studio lighting, pastel fantasy, anime, cartoon, glossy 3d, low quality, blurry, watermark, logo, readable text, captions
presets.sample_prompt: A young courier stands in a rain-soaked Hong Kong alley at night, holding a brass compass glowing blue, neon signs reflected on wet asphalt, steam rising from a food stall, tense expression

presets.name: Symmetric Pastel Cinema
presets.subtitle_zh: 中轴 · 粉彩 · 荒诞童话
presets.description: 韦斯安德森式强中轴、平面化镜头、复古布景、粉彩、荒诞童话感
presets.positive_prompt: symmetrical cinematic composition, centered character framing, pastel color palette, retro production design, flat frontal camera angle, carefully arranged props, storybook-like live-action scene, whimsical deadpan mood, vintage costume details, clean geometric set design, soft diffused lighting
presets.negative_prompt: chaotic composition, handheld realism, gritty darkness, horror mood, high saturation neon, anime, cartoon, 3d toy look, text, logo, watermark, blurry
presets.sample_prompt: A young inventor stands perfectly centered on a tiny retro train platform, holding a brass compass, pastel luggage and neatly arranged props around them, flat frontal camera angle

presets.name: Warm Hand-Drawn Anime
presets.subtitle_zh: 水彩背景 · 自然光 · 冒险童话
presets.description: 手绘动画、自然、童话、冒险、温暖背景。适配成长、奇幻、田园
presets.positive_prompt: warm hand-drawn animated film look, painterly watercolor backgrounds, soft cel-shaded characters, gentle natural light, detailed lived-in environments, whimsical adventure mood, organic shapes, warm earthy palette, handcrafted illustration texture, emotional storybook atmosphere
presets.negative_prompt: photorealistic, hard 3d render, CGI plastic look, gritty realism, horror, low quality, blurry, watermark, logo, text, captions, deformed hands
presets.sample_prompt: A young adventurer stands on an old countryside train platform after rain, holding a brass compass glowing soft blue, grass moving in the wind, distant hills and warm clouds

presets.name: Modern Cel Anime
presets.subtitle_zh: 清晰线稿 · 明快色彩 · 通用日漫
presets.description: 最通用日漫风，清晰线稿、明亮颜色、角色表现力
presets.positive_prompt: modern cel-shaded anime, clean linework, expressive eyes, crisp silhouettes, vibrant but controlled colors, detailed character design, cinematic anime background, polished key visual composition, dynamic readable pose, sharp lighting accents, high-quality 2D animation still
presets.negative_prompt: photorealistic, western cartoon, 3d render, watercolor blur, muddy colors, low detail, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, text, logo, watermark
presets.sample_prompt: A young anime protagonist stands on a rain-wet train platform at sunset, holding a brass compass glowing blue, wind lifting the jacket, dramatic clouds behind

presets.name: 80s-90s Urban Anime
presets.subtitle_zh: 复古赛璐璐 · 都市夜景 · 时装感
presets.description: 复古赛璐璐、都市夜景、时装感、胶片颗粒、成人向都市故事
presets.positive_prompt: 1980s-1990s Japanese urban anime, retro cel animation, hand-painted city background, analog film grain, mature character proportions, stylish vintage fashion, night city lights, clean ink lines, soft airbrushed highlights, dramatic yet elegant pose, nostalgic television anime frame
presets.negative_prompt: modern digital anime gloss, chibi, 3d render, photorealistic, super deformed, overly cute, low quality, blurry, text, logo, watermark, speech bubbles
presets.sample_prompt: A stylish young private investigator stands near a city train platform at night, teal jacket, brass compass in hand, skyline lights and passing train reflections

presets.name: Fashion Battle Anime
presets.subtitle_zh: 高挑人物 · 黑白高反差 · 能量视觉
presets.description: 高挑人物、黑白高反差、街头时装、强剪影、能量视觉
presets.positive_prompt: fashion-forward battle anime, tall elegant character proportions, sharp black ink lines, high-contrast graphic composition, stylish streetwear, dramatic white and black balance, spiritual energy aura, clean negative space, dynamic pose, urban supernatural mood, refined character silhouette
presets.negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3d render, cute chibi style, soft watercolor, cluttered background, copied existing character, logo, text, watermark, blurry, deformed hands, extra fingers
presets.sample_prompt: A tall young supernatural fighter stands on an empty train platform under a stormy sky, wearing minimalist black-and-white streetwear, holding a brass compass glowing with blue energy, sharp silhouette

presets.name: Stylized 3D Animation
presets.subtitle_zh: 圆润 · 表情生动 · 电影级动画
presets.description: 家庭向、圆润、表情生动、电影级动画
presets.positive_prompt: stylized feature-quality 3D animation, expressive rounded character design, appealing shape language, warm cinematic lighting, rich color design, soft subsurface skin shading, detailed but friendly environment, polished animation render, clear emotional storytelling, family adventure tone
presets.negative_prompt: photorealistic, flat 2d drawing, low-poly model, horror mood, uncanny face, rough texture, plastic toy look, low quality, blurry, text, logo, watermark
presets.sample_prompt: A young explorer stands on a colorful train platform after rain, holding a brass compass glowing blue, eyes full of wonder

presets.name: Graphic Novel & Superhero
presets.subtitle_zh: 粗线 · 英雄剪影 · 高反差光影
presets.description: 融合美漫线稿能量与图像小说电影感，强剪影、粗墨线、动态构图、印刷纹理
presets.positive_prompt: American graphic novel style, bold ink outlines, strong heroic silhouettes, halftone shading, dramatic panel composition, dynamic action framing, high-contrast cinematic lighting, detailed city backdrop, vibrant color blocking with intense accents, printed paper texture, expressive face, energetic perspective, premium cover art composition
presets.negative_prompt: known superhero costume, copyrighted emblem, photorealistic, soft watercolor, blurry, 3d render, muted colors, speech bubbles, captions, readable text, logo, watermark, distorted anatomy, cute cartoon
presets.sample_prompt: An original masked guardian stands on a rain-slick rooftop at night, holding a brass compass glowing electric blue, cape caught in the wind, city skyline behind, dramatic heroic silhouette

presets.name: Painterly 3D Series
presets.subtitle_zh: 3D结构 · 2D厚涂笔触 · 暗调情绪
presets.description: 3D结构+2D厚涂笔触，戏剧光影，暗调情绪，强角色脸
presets.positive_prompt: painterly 3D animated series style, stylized realistic proportions, hand-painted texture overlays, brushstroke shading, dramatic rim light, gritty urban fantasy atmosphere, expressive angular face design, cinematic color contrast, rich material texture, emotional close framing, premium adult animation look
presets.negative_prompt: cute family cartoon, glossy plastic 3d, flat anime cel shading, photorealistic live action, low-poly, oversaturated colors, text, logo, watermark, blurry, copied existing character
presets.sample_prompt: A young mechanic-mage stands on an industrial train platform at night, holding a brass compass glowing blue through the rain, pipes and city towers in the background

presets.name: Dark Fantasy Illustration
presets.subtitle_zh: 明暗对比 · 古迹 · 史诗氛围
presets.description: 暗黑奇幻插画，戏剧明暗、古迹、神秘背光
presets.positive_prompt: dark fantasy illustration, dramatic chiaroscuro, ancient ruins, enchanted mist, ornate costume details, moody color palette, painterly brushwork, epic atmosphere, mystical backlight, high-detail fantasy concept art, solemn heroic mood
presets.negative_prompt: cute cartoon, bright cheerful colors, modern city, sci-fi neon, flat lighting, low detail, blurry, text, logo, watermark, copied fantasy character
presets.sample_prompt: A young knight stands before a ruined cathedral gate, holding a compass glowing with ancient light, mist swirling around crumbling pillars

presets.name: Chinese Ink Fantasy
presets.subtitle_zh: 水墨晕染 · 宣纸纹理 · 诗意留白
presets.description: 中国水墨奇幻插画，流动的墨渍、宣纸质感、飘逸笔线
presets.positive_prompt: Chinese ink fantasy illustration, flowing ink wash, xuan paper texture, elegant brush lines, misty mountains, poetic negative space, subtle mineral color accents, ancient costume silhouette, ethereal atmosphere, refined composition
presets.negative_prompt: western medieval fantasy, cyberpunk, glossy 3d, photorealistic, heavy comic outlines, oversaturated colors, low quality, blurry, text, logo, watermark
presets.sample_prompt: A young swordsman stands on a misty mountain bridge, ink brush strokes forming the distant peaks, holding a compass that glows through the fog

presets.name: Clay Stop-Motion Miniature
presets.subtitle_zh: 手工质感 · 微缩场景 · 温馨
presets.description: 黏土定格动画风格，手工角色、触感纹理、微缩实景
presets.positive_prompt: clay stop-motion miniature style, handcrafted character, tactile clay texture, tiny practical set, soft studio lighting, charming imperfections, shallow depth of field, handmade props, whimsical physical animation look, cozy storybook mood
presets.negative_prompt: photorealistic human, glossy 3d render, flat 2d anime, hard plastic toy, horror doll look, low quality, blurry, text, logo, watermark
presets.sample_prompt: A tiny clay adventurer stands on a handmade miniature train platform, holding a brass compass, warm lamp light, cozy storybook atmosphere
